title: Probabilistic Models Path
description: Build fluency in Probabilistic Models inside Statistical Methods by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: State Space Models (S4)
steps.summary: State Space Models (S4) belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Probabilistic Models. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Probabilistic Models. Start after State Space. It opens into S4 (Structured State Space Models) and S4 (Structured State-Space Sequence Model).
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: S4 (Structured State Space Models)
steps.summary: S4 (Structured State Space Models) belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Probabilistic Models. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Probabilistic Models. Start after S4 state-space model and State Space Models (S4). It opens into S4 (Structured State-Space Sequence Model).
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: S4 state-space model
steps.summary: S4 state-space model belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Probabilistic Models. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Probabilistic Models. Start after State Space. It opens into S4 (Structured State Space Models) and S4 (Structured State-Space Sequence Model).
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Autoregressive Integrated Models
steps.summary: Autoregressive Integrated Models belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Probabilistic Models. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Probabilistic Models. Start after AutoRegressive Models. It opens into ARIMA (AutoRegressive Integrated Moving Average) and AutoRegressive Integrated Moving Average (ARIMA).
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Mamba (Selective State Space Model)
steps.summary: Mamba (Selective State Space Model) belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Probabilistic Models. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Probabilistic Models. Start after State-Space Mamba and State Space.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: S4 (Structured State-Space Sequence Model)
steps.summary: S4 (Structured State-Space Sequence Model) belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Probabilistic Models. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Probabilistic Models. Start after S4 (Structured State Space Models) and S4 state-space model.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Likelihood
steps.summary: Likelihood belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Probabilistic Models. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Probabilistic Models. Compare it with AutoRegressive Models and Variational Autoregressive Models. It opens into log-likelihood and Likelihood Ratios.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: State-Space Mamba
steps.summary: State-Space Mamba belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Probabilistic Models. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Probabilistic Models. Start after State Space and Mamba. It opens into Mamba (Selective State Space Model).
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
